filter_pushdown.note: Zone-map-guided: ~85% of 600 blocks skipped; qualifying blocks form a contiguous range — break early once zone_min >= 9131

data_structures.zone_map: flat_array({int32_t min, int32_t max} x 600) — loaded fully into L1 cache (4804 bytes)
data_structures.partial_sums: double[64] thread-local accumulators — final reduction via single sequential sum
data_structures.aggregation: scalar_double (no groups, no hash table needed)

parallelism.note: Distribute the ~87 qualifying blocks across 64 threads using atomic block-index counter; each thread independently accumulates a partial double sum
parallelism.final_reduction: sequential sum of 64 partial sums after parallel phase

index_usage.purpose: skip_blocks_outside_shipdate_range [8766, 9131); skip if zone_max < 8766 OR zone_min >= 9131; early-exit loop once zone_min >= 9131 (data sorted ascending)

physical_plan.scan_note: Within each qualifying block, fuse all three filters and the sum accumulation into one vectorized loop over l_shipdate, l_discount, l_quantity, l_extendedprice. No intermediate materialization.

io_strategy.prefetch_note: After zone-map pass identifies qualifying block range, issue madvise(MADV_WILLNEED) for all four columns over [first_qualifying_byte, last_qualifying_byte] concurrently before spawning worker threads
io_strategy.data_volume_reduction: ~15% of each column file read vs full scan (~278 MB total instead of ~1.9 GB)

per_row_ops: load l_extendedprice (double); accumulate partial_sum += l_extendedprice * l_discount
fused_loop_detail.vectorization: AVX-512 capable; 8 doubles per SIMD register for discount/quantity/extendedprice; branchless mask accumulation

estimated_cost.bottleneck: memory bandwidth (warm) or HDD sequential I/O on qualifying ranges only (cold)
